name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️ Authentic Grade Packaging as shown
🌿Chane1 23 Latest Edition Gold Ball Clasp Bag
Metal ball adjustable buckle Square 🤍Dark Grey
Purchased at counter price 36200rmb〰️
Latest Gold Ball Clasp CF Square 💡

Offers many ways to carry the bag🪄
Crossbody Shoulder Handbag Clutch〰️
Cute shape is mesmerizing, surprisingly large capacity❕
Matches all seasons, versatile style, looks great on anyone🖤
Feels younger and trendier than the classic, a must-have for collectors✔️
Hardware: Full copper 24K vintage gold
Material: Cutting Dept zp lambskin
Lining: Montebello gold zp calf
Dimensions: 18*13*7 cm
